div.head: 487. Telegram From the Department of State to the Embassy in LaosSource: Department of State, Central Files, 751].00/10–2557. Secret; Niact. Drafted by Byrne and cleared by Kocher and by Young and Robertson in draft. Repeated to Paris, London, Saigon, Phnom Penh, Bangkok, and CINCPAC for POLAD.
div.p: 434. Vientiane 660 repeated Paris 127 London 121 Saigon 172 Bangkok Phnom Penh Unnumbered;Document 485. Vientiane 661 repeated Paris 126 London 120 Saigon 171 Bangkok Phnom Penh Unnumbered.Supra. Vientiane 659See footnote 5, Document 485. not received but we assume it contains information re new text political agreement which would be even greater surrender to PL than that reported Vientiane 646.Document 483. We sincerely hope this may be exploited Western advantage as was PL demand RLG accept Chinese Communist aid.
We are opposed terms all known agreements and you may interpret instructions and specific criticisms set forth Deparment’s 403, 414, and 422 as strongly as circumstances warrant.
We continue endorse (Department’s 1567 to Vientiane June 18, 1957Document 449.) your use four-step policy set forth paragraph 4 Vientiane 2077.Document 447.
Message from Secretary to Crown PrinceSuch a message was not sent. See Document 500. being revised conform new situation.
